title: AMINO-ACID SEQUENCES IDENTIFICATION
author_string: MEDEL JUAREZ, JOSE DE JESUS, ZAGACETA ALVAREZ, MARIA TERESA, AGUILAR CRUZ, KAREN ALICIA, PALMA OROZCO, ROSAURA
abstract: Within signal processing, parameter estimation is necessary to obtain coefficients applicable to classification, optimization, prediction or identification algorithms. The latter, of interest in this work, refers to the reconstruction of a signal, corrected from the error generated between the desired and the identified signal.
